tech_news.title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 - Apple
tech_news.description: Due to the Digital Markets Act, Apple will not be able to ship Siri AI in the European Union with the release of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.

tech_news.title: Apple is tweaking its controversial Liquid Glass design - TechCrunch

tech_news.title: Google AI Plus gets price drop to $4.99 and storage bump - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google announced today that its AI Plus subscription is getting a price drop to $4.99 per month and now includes 400 GB of storage.
